data.title: DuPont announces plans to separate electronics business, unveil spin-off brand "Qnity". Will outline 3-4% sales growth and 8-10% EPS growth at Investor Day on Nov 1.
data.description: DuPont de Nemours, Inc. (NYSE: DD) made public its intention to separate its electronics business in January. The spin-off was named Qnity in May. DuPont revealed plans to hold its 2025 Investor Day on Nov. 1 with top executives introducing the post-spin-off portfolio. Key topics will include value-creation strategies and financial projections. CEO Lori Koch described this move as a pivotal moment for the company to enhance profitability. Medium-term financial objectives include 3-4% organic sales growth CAGR, a 150-200 basis points increase in operating EBITDA margin, and 8-10% adjusted EPS growth CAGR. Separately, agricultural science leader Corteva is considering a breakup to protect its seed unit from potential risks. Additional details can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Audi debuts first E5 Sportback with Ambilight's EC smart dimming sunroof in Shenzhen, China, signaling a major milestone.
data.description: In Shenzhen, China, on September 18, 2025, Audi debuted the E5 Sportback as its first mass-produced electric vehicle. The vehicle includes Ambilight's electrochromic smart dimming sunroof as a standard feature on premium trims. This release represents a significant achievement for Audi in the EV market.

data.title: Kelyniam Global, Inc. got FDA clearance on Sep 18, 2025, for Fusion™ BCP-PEEK implant. #Cantklyniam #FDA510k
data.description: In Canton, Connecticut on September 18, 2025, Kelyniam Global, Inc. revealed that they have obtained 510(k) clearance from the U.S. Food and Drug Administration for their Fusion™ Cranial and craniofacial implant solutions. Kelyniam is recognized as a top supplier of personalized cranial and craniofacial implants.

data.title: CAKE price rockets to $2.76, up 8.23% as record $58.7B trading volume boosts bullish momentum.
data.description: The price of CAKE surged to $2.76, marking an 8.23% increase in daily gains. This increase followed PancakeSwap's announcement of a record-breaking $58.7 billion trading volume in August, along with strategic token burn initiatives.

data.title: AI now the top priority for global insurance executives in 2025, surpassing inflation, survey shows.
data.description: In a recent International Insurance Society survey, it was revealed that artificial intelligence (AI) has taken the top spot as the most crucial industry priority.
Trump: Russia Ukraine was heading to a third world war

data.title: Churchill Stateside Group funds $11M Tax-Exempt Construction Loan for Senior Housing in New Orleans.
data.description: Churchill Stateside Group, LLC, a real estate and renewable energy financial services company based in Clearwater, Florida, recently finalized an $11 million Tax-Exempt Construction Loan for Canal Crossing. This project, situated in New Orleans, Louisiana, involves the development of a 49-unit affordable Low Income Housing Tax Credit senior housing complex. Canal Crossing aims to repurpose a historic building, combining affordable housing initiatives with architectural preservation.

data.title: US CPSC surpasses Biden-era recall record with more than 100 days left in 2025, reflecting stronger safety measures.
data.description: On September 18, 2025, the U.S. Consumer Product Safety Commission revealed that it has exceeded the total number of product safety recalls and warnings from 2024. This milestone was reached over three months ahead of the year's end. The increase in recalls and warnings illustrates a significant improvement in the commission’s ability to identify and address safety concerns promptly and effectively.
EU Official: European Commission is discussing a proposal to accelerate ban on Russian LNG in the 19th package of sanctions against Russia.
Ryanair Reports 190 Flights Delayed Up To 3 Hours, Affecting 35,000 Passengers Due To French Air Traffic Control Strike

data.title: Quantum stocks soar as IonQ acquires Oxford Ionics and Vector Atomic with $200M government contracts, hitting new highs.
data.description: Quantum stocks soared on Wednesday due to acquisitions, analyst coverage, and positive investor sentiment. IonQ stock surged to new highs after acquiring Oxford Ionics and announcing plans to acquire quantum sensor company Vector Atomic, with over $200 million in government contracts. Needham analyst N. Quinn Bolton maintained a Buy rating and an $80 price target on IonQ shares. IonQ also revealed a partnership with the Department of Energy Quantum-in-Space collaboration post-market, to advance space-based quantum technologies. The article can be read in detail on Benzinga.com.

data.title: ONDO sees 6% surge to $1.07; Bulls challenge $1.14 resistance. Volume hits $41.7M, signaling potential breakout.
data.description: The price of ONDO has risen by 6.09% to reach $1.07, indicating a strengthening bullish trend. Key technical indicators suggest the possibility of a breakout above crucial resistance levels, with a trading volume hitting $41.7 million.

data.title: GYMGUYZ expands to West Metro & Minnetonka, MN with first territory, offering in-home/on-site workouts.
data.description: Providing tailored and innovative training services for households and companies throughout the community, GYMGUYZ has expanded its offerings to the Minnetonka and West Metro area in Minnesota. As of September 18, 2025, the renowned in-home and on-site personal training franchise, GYMGUYZ, is now catering to these regions. The franchise's presence is expected to benefit a large number of families and businesses in need of personalized and convenient fitness solutions.
White House Official: The Trump Administration was not involved in Nvidia's investment in Intel. $NVDA $INTC

data.title: Dow Jones up after rate cut, jobless data. Nvidia rises with Intel stake. Oklo crosses 100.
data.description: Following unexpected weekly jobless claims, the Dow Jones Industrial Average surged along with other indexes. Nvidia's stock saw a significant increase due to its stake in Intel. Today, the stock market reported positive numbers with the Dow Jones on the rise after a rate cut and promising jobless data. Additionally, Oklo's value surpassed 100.
Fed bids for 4-week bills total $282.9 mln.

data.title: Inventor from Indianapolis creates Colorful Night Light Plus Kids Safety Protector to prevent electrical shock for children.
data.description: In Pittsburgh on September 18, 2025, an inventor from Indianapolis, Indiana shared the inspiration behind the creation of a new product. The inventor expressed the desire to develop a nightlight for children that would not only illuminate their room but also provide protection against electrical shock. This led to the invention of the COLORFUL NIGHT LIGHT PLUS KIDS SAFETY PROTECTOR. The innovative design aims to enhance safety and features a unique...

data.title: Report by Connected Nation shows 1/3 rural US households face internet insecurity; urgent need for action.
data.description: A recent study by Connected Nation (CN) in Bowling Green, Kentucky, dated September 18, 2025, highlights the pressing need to tackle internet insecurity. The study found that almost 33% of rural households surveyed have faced challenges with their home internet setup in the past. This data underscores the significance of addressing this issue promptly to ensure reliable internet access for all.

data.title: Global leaders gather in Washington for 2nd IACC MAC meeting to combat counterfeiting worldwide. #CrossIndustrySolutions.
data.description: Today, the International AntiCounterfeiting Coalition (IACC) will hold the second meeting of its Marketplace Advisory Council (MAC) in Washington, D.C. This council is composed of the biggest e-commerce platforms and social media companies worldwide. Established in 2025, the MAC aims to combat the rise of counterfeit goods in online marketplaces. This initiative focuses on fostering collaboration between industry leaders and experts to address this issue effectively.

data.title: GoodPower organization rebranded after 17 years, aiming to empower humanity for global transition to a decarbonized economy.
data.description: On September 18, 2025, in New York, GoodPower was launched, an organization with a 17-year history focusing on unlocking the economic potential of renewable energy transition worldwide. With a strong track record of making an impact, GoodPower aims to drive the shift towards renewable energy sources.
